trade_plans.entry_trigger: Price enters entry zone and 1h candle closes above $0.093 with increased volume.
trade_plans.invalidation: Price closes below $0.089 or 1h RSI drops below 30.
confluence_signals: Price falling with LOW volume (weak selling) - bullish divergence
EXTREME short crowd (8th percentile L/S Ratio) - contrarian bullish
Fear & Greed Index at Extreme Fear (12) - contrarian buy signal
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Four strong contrarian and technical signals align for a bullish setup. The extreme short crowd, weak selling pressure, and market-wide extreme fear provide a solid foundation for a bounce. MACD also supports a bullish trend.

Conflicting sentiment signals. Funding rate indicates extreme crowded longs, suggesting long squeeze risk, while the account long/short ratio indicates an extreme short crowd, suggesting a contrarian bullish move. This contradiction makes a clear directional call difficult, further complicated by accelerating negative funding velocity.
